title: Dissimulation
short_description: A first-person dungeon-crawling rule discovery puzzle game, fully playable with a Launchpad Pro MK3.
description: Dissimulation is a first person, dungeon crawling, rule discovery puzzle game, fully playable with a Launchpad Pro MK3. Explore a small dungeon, learn how to open the gates blocking your way, and find your way out. It came out of EdJam26 and it 'masks' information with darkness.
